zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Jane Rugge於大約1475年出生在英國史洛普爾拉奇時，她的父親Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF31歲，母親Margaret Sheehan 16GGM23歲。她於1497年與Sir William Molyneux在英國藍卡爾澤福頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1521年10月22日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾澤福頓享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭梅瑟希德澤福頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Jane Rugge于大约1475年出生在英国史洛普爾拉奇时，她的父亲Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF31岁，母亲Margaret Sheehan 16GGM23岁。她于1497年与Sir William Molyneux在英国藍卡爾澤福頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1521年10月22日在英国英格兰藍卡爾澤福頓享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰梅瑟希德澤福頓。

nameMeanings.name: Rugge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Thor.  German Hans, Kurt.
Danish: habitational name from a place so named in Denmark, or from the personal name Buggi, a short form of various German compound names.
Norwegian: of Danish origin (see 1 above), or a habitational name from the farm name Bogge of uncertain origin or from a shortened form of the placename Bugøynes in Finnmark.

variants.name: Bugg
meanings: English: nickname for an uncouth or weird man, from Middle English bugge ‘hobgoblin, bogy, scarecrow’.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Jane Rugge was born about 1475, in Rudge, Shropshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF, was 31 and her mother, Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, was 23. She married Sir William Molyneux in 1497, in Sefton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 22 October 1521, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Sefton, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Jane Rugge est née environ 1475, à Rudge, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Molyneux en 1497, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1521, à Sefton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterrée à Sefton, Merseyside, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Jane Rugge um 1475 in Rudge, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF 31 und ihre Mutter Margaret Sheehan 16GGM 23. Sie hat 1497 in Sefton, Lancashire, England Sir William Molyneux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. Oktober 1521 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Sefton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Sefton, Merseyside, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Rugge è nata il circa 1475 nel Rudge, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Molyneux nel 1497, nel Sefton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 22 ottobre 1521, nel Sefton, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolta a Sefton, Merseyside, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Ruggeが約1475年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアルッジで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Rugge 16GGFは31歳，母Margaret Sheehan 16GGMは23歳であった。1497年にイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンでSir William Molyneuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1521年10月22日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアセフトンで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスメルセイシドセフトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Jane Rugge(이)가 대략 1475년 영국 슈럽실르 루지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Sheehan 16GGM(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 Sir William Molyneux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1521년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 세프턴에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 머세이시드 세프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Jane Rugge nasceu aproximadamente 1475, em Rudge, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Molyneux em 1497, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de outubro de 1521, em Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultada em Sefton, Merseyside, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Jane Rugge родилась около 1475 г. в местности рудж, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Molyneux в 1497 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 22 октября 1521 г. в местности сефтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и была похоронена в местности сефтон, мирсисид, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Jane Rugge nació aproximadamente 1475, en Rudge, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Rugge 16GGF, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Sheehan 16GGM, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir William Molyneux en 1497, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 22 de octubre de 1521, en Sefton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultada en Sefton, Merseyside, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
